components.name: Theme tokens
components.purpose: Shared design values for color, surfaces, text, spacing, radius, shadow, focus, and status colors.
components.useWhen: Use for app-wide visual theming and package alignment.
components.avoidWhen: Do not use raw theme token files as component behavior.
components.accessibilityNotes: Focus and status tokens must preserve contrast.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer semantic --dv-* tokens over hard-coded colors.

components.name: Density tokens
components.purpose: Shared compact, standard, and comfortable sizing tokens.
components.useWhen: Use to align repeated controls and grid density.
components.avoidWhen: Do not invent unrelated density names.
components.accessibilityNotes: Compact density must remain keyboard and touch usable.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use compact, standard, comfortable only.

components.name: Utility classes
components.purpose: Small shared utility classes for text, truncation, screen-reader text, and focus rings.
components.useWhen: Use for cross-component non-visual behavior utilities.
components.avoidWhen: Do not move component-specific styles into ui-core.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use dv-sr-only for assistive-only labels.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer these utilities before adding duplicate helper classes.

components.name: Button
components.purpose: Text action control for primary, secondary, subtle, danger, and ghost actions.
components.useWhen: Use for primary business actions such as Save, Submit, Create, or Cancel.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for repeated icon-only utilities; use IconButton or ToolbarButton instead.
components.accessibilityNotes: Button renders a native button and supports disabled/loading states.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use visible text for important actions.

components.name: IconButton
components.useWhen: Use for repeated utility actions like refresh, close, clear, and more.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for destructive or primary business actions without visible text.
components.accessibilityNotes: Every icon-only button must have an aria-label.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not create unlabeled icon-only controls.

components.name: ToolbarButton
components.purpose: Dense toolbar action that can show icon and label.
components.useWhen: Use inside repeated toolbars or compact command rows.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for standalone page-level primary actions.
components.accessibilityNotes: Keep label meaningful even when visual space is compact.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer ToolbarButton for dense repeated utility commands.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.useWhen: Use for adjacent related actions or attached toolbar controls.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for unrelated actions.
components.accessibilityNotes: Keep grouped controls individually labelled.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use only when grouping clarifies action relationship.

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.useWhen: Use for density, theme preview, or view mode selection.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for large option sets; use Select instead.
components.accessibilityNotes: Provide an accessible label.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for compact mode choices, not multi-select.

components.name: Icon
components.purpose: Small built-in symbol component used by Dravyn controls.
components.useWhen: Use supported icon names with Dravyn buttons and toolbar controls.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid adding external icon libraries by default.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use decorative icons unless the icon itself carries meaning.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not introduce an icon dependency for one-off symbols.

components.name: Text
components.purpose: Body text primitive with size and tone options.
components.useWhen: Use for paragraphs and supporting copy.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for headings; use Heading.
components.accessibilityNotes: Choose semantic element through the as prop when needed.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer Text over ad hoc paragraph classes.

components.name: Heading
components.useWhen: Use for section and page headings.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid using large display type inside compact panels.
components.accessibilityNotes: Keep heading levels logical.
components.aiUsageNotes: Match heading size to container density.

components.name: Label
components.useWhen: Use to label controls or dense metadata.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid as general body text.
components.accessibilityNotes: Connect labels to controls using htmlFor.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer Field for full form field composition.

components.name: Caption
components.useWhen: Use for hints, metadata, and timestamps.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for required error text; use ValidationMessage or InlineMessage.
components.accessibilityNotes: Do not make critical instructions too small to read.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use muted tone for secondary details.

components.name: CodeText
components.purpose: Inline or block code-like text primitive.
components.useWhen: Use for tokens, paths, commands, and code identifiers.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for long code examples; use pre/code in docs.
components.accessibilityNotes: Keep code labels readable and copyable when important.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for literal identifiers in UI copy.

components.name: Field
components.purpose: Form field wrapper for labels, descriptions, validation, and safe control relationships.
components.useWhen: Use around form controls that need label/help/error text.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid duplicating label and validation layout manually.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use Field's render function to receive a stable control id, aria-describedby, invalid, required, and disabled props. Static children remain compatible through htmlFor plus a matching control id.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer Field for standard form composition. Do not expect Field to clone or mutate arbitrary child controls.

components.name: ValidationMessage
components.purpose: Inline validation or supporting message with error, warning, success, and info tones.
components.useWhen: Use with aria-describedby or near fields for validation and form feedback.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for page-level blocking messages; use InlineMessage or ErrorState.
components.accessibilityNotes: Error tone uses alert semantics and can be referenced by aria-describedby.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Field error for standard field errors; use ValidationMessage for custom form compositions.

components.name: TextInput
components.purpose: Native text input with Dravyn styling.
components.useWhen: Use for short text values.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for long multi-line input; use Textarea.
components.accessibilityNotes: Provide an associated label.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep validation in Field/ValidationMessage.

components.name: SearchInput
components.useWhen: Use for filtering lists, tables, or page content.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for general text entry.
components.accessibilityNotes: Label search inputs clearly.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for search/filter intent only.

components.name: Select
components.purpose: Native select control with Dravyn styling.
components.useWhen: Use for small to medium option lists.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for multi-select until MultiSelect exists.
components.accessibilityNotes: Provide label and meaningful option text.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use native select before inventing custom dropdowns.

components.name: Checkbox
components.useWhen: Use for independent binary choices.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for mutually exclusive sets; use Radio when available.
components.accessibilityNotes: Ensure label text describes the checked state.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for true/false preferences and row selection.

components.name: Textarea
components.useWhen: Use for longer text values and comments.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for short single-line values.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use Field for label and error text.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer Textarea over contenteditable.

components.name: Badge
components.useWhen: Use for short neutral, info, success, warning, or danger labels.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for long messages; use InlineMessage or Alert.
components.accessibilityNotes: Do not rely on color alone for meaning.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep badge text short.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.useWhen: Use for consistent entity or workflow statuses.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid when the content is not a status.
components.accessibilityNotes: Status text should be explicit.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use status prop for known statuses.

components.name: InlineMessage
components.useWhen: Use near forms or content sections for local info/warning/error/success messages.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for page-level blocking errors; use ErrorState.
components.accessibilityNotes: Danger validation messages should be announced where needed.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use InlineMessage for local feedback.

components.name: Alert
components.useWhen: Use for important messages that need stronger visual weight.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for tiny metadata; use Badge or Caption.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use appropriate role for urgent messages.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use sparingly for important feedback.

components.name: EmptyState
components.useWhen: Use when a list, grid, or panel has no records.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for loading or error states.
components.accessibilityNotes: Message should explain what happened and possible next action.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for empty content, not as decoration.

components.name: ErrorState
components.purpose: Error placeholder or blocking error surface.
components.useWhen: Use when content failed to load or a section cannot render.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for inline validation; use ValidationMessage.
components.accessibilityNotes: Error states should be understandable without color.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for failed content areas.

components.name: LoadingState
components.useWhen: Use while content is being fetched or prepared.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for skeleton row placeholders; use Skeleton or grid skeleton rows.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use aria-busy where relevant.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use label text for loading context.

components.name: Skeleton
components.useWhen: Use for placeholder UI while content loads.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid when a text loading label is clearer.
components.accessibilityNotes: Respect reduced motion.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use sparingly for structure placeholders.

components.name: Card
components.useWhen: Use for individual repeated items or genuinely framed tools.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid nesting cards inside cards or using cards as page sections.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use semantic children inside Card.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not turn whole pages into stacks of decorative cards.

components.name: Panel
components.purpose: Section container with optional title, description, and actions.
components.useWhen: Use for titled settings or content panels.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for tiny inline content.
components.accessibilityNotes: Panel title should describe the section.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Panel for titled content regions.

components.name: Stack
components.useWhen: Use for consistent vertical spacing.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for horizontal layouts; use Inline.
components.accessibilityNotes: Stack does not add semantics by itself.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer Stack over ad hoc margin chains.

components.name: Inline
components.useWhen: Use for compact rows of controls or metadata.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for vertical layout; use Stack.
components.accessibilityNotes: Inline does not add semantics by itself.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for control rows and action clusters.

components.name: Section
components.useWhen: Use for unframed page sections.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid when a framed component is required; use Panel or Card.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use meaningful headings.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Section for full-width page structure.

components.name: Popover
components.purpose: Small floating content anchored to a trigger.
components.useWhen: Use for contextual controls or short information.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for complex forms; use Dialog or Drawer.
components.accessibilityNotes: Support Escape close and focus return.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep popover content compact.

components.name: Menu
components.useWhen: Use for compact action lists.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for navigation trees or complex forms.
components.accessibilityNotes: Menu items need clear labels and keyboard support.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not hide destructive actions behind unclear labels.

components.name: Dropdown
components.purpose: Dropdown composition for trigger and menu-like content.
components.useWhen: Use for compact option/action surfaces.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for native form select choices; use Select.
components.accessibilityNotes: Trigger should expose expanded state.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Dropdown for composed overlay content.

components.name: Tooltip
components.useWhen: Use to clarify compact controls.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for required instructions.
components.accessibilityNotes: Tooltip is not a substitute for accessible names.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use tooltip as supporting help only.

components.name: Dialog
components.useWhen: Use for focused decisions, confirmations, and short forms.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for large workflows; use Drawer or a page.
components.accessibilityNotes: Dialog should be labelled and support Escape close.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use title and description for context.

components.name: Drawer
components.useWhen: Use for secondary workflows, filters, or detail panels.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for tiny contextual actions; use Popover or Menu.
components.accessibilityNotes: Drawer should be labelled and closable.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Drawer for larger secondary surfaces.

components.name: ConfirmDialog
components.useWhen: Use before destructive or high-impact actions.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for routine low-risk actions.
components.accessibilityNotes: Confirm and cancel actions must be clear.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use for destructive confirmation flows.

components.name: UniversalDataGrid
components.useWhen: Use for data-heavy tables requiring search, sort, pagination, columns, selection, grouping, or adapters.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid as a generic layout table or simple key-value display.
components.accessibilityNotes: Grid controls need labels, keyboard access, and visible focus.
components.aiUsageNotes: Apps own rows, fetching, permissions, and business actions.

components.name: DataGridToolbar
components.useWhen: Use inside grid workflows when exposed by the grid package.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for generic page toolbars; use ui-components primitives.
components.accessibilityNotes: Toolbar actions must be labelled.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep grid-specific controls in ui-data-grid.

components.name: DataGridColumnMenu
components.purpose: Column visibility, density, order, and reset menu.
components.useWhen: Use for grid column management.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for generic menus outside grids.
components.accessibilityNotes: Column menu controls need labels and keyboard support.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not move grid-specific menu behavior into ui-components.

components.name: DataGrid state/adapters
components.purpose: Public grid state helpers and persistence/server/export adapter contracts.
components.useWhen: Use for controlled grid state, persistence preferences, server query contracts, and export requests.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid using them as a global app store or file generator.
components.basicUsageExample: const state = createGridState({ pagination: { pageIndex: 0, pageSize: 25 } });
components.accessibilityNotes: State helpers are non-visual.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not store row data in grid state.

components.name: DataGridBulkActionBar
components.useWhen: Use later if exported publicly.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import today; bulk actions are configured through UniversalDataGrid props.
components.accessibilityNotes: Bulk actions should describe selected row scope.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not invent a public DataGridBulkActionBar import until it exists.

components.name: AppShell
components.purpose: Application shell layout with optional header, sidebar, footer, and explicit page/content/split scroll behavior.
components.useWhen: Use for admin portals, customer portals, and enterprise apps that need a consistent shell without routing assumptions.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for small inline layouts or when an app-specific router shell already owns all regions.
components.basicUsageExample: <AppShell scrollMode='content' headerPosition='sticky' sidebarPosition='sticky' header={<TopNav />} sidebar={<SideNav items={items} />}>Content</AppShell>
components.accessibilityNotes: Pass meaningful header/sidebar content and avoid duplicate main landmarks inside shell content unless Page owns the main region.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use scrollMode='page' for simple pages, 'content' for admin/docs apps with persistent navigation, and 'split' for independently scrollable nav/content. Do not add router integration, global state, or one-off app CSS for persistent navigation when AppShell props can express it.

components.name: Page
components.purpose: Page composition wrapper with optional title, description, status, actions, toolbar, density, and max-width.
components.useWhen: Use for top-level app pages that need consistent header, toolbar, and content spacing.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid inside tiny cards, dialogs, or embedded widgets where a full page landmark would be excessive.
components.accessibilityNotes: Page renders a main landmark; avoid nesting it inside another main landmark.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Page for route-level composition, not repeated item cards.

components.name: PageHeader
components.purpose: Reusable page header with title, description, eyebrow, status, metadata, breadcrumbs, and actions.
components.useWhen: Use for route/page headers or major workflow headers.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for small panel headings; use Panel or Section title props instead.
components.accessibilityNotes: Title renders as an h1; preserve heading order in surrounding pages.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use PageHeader for route-level headers and keep action labels explicit.

components.name: PageToolbar
components.purpose: Standard page-level toolbar for search, filters, refresh, export, view controls, and secondary actions.
components.useWhen: Use below a page header for dense enterprise page controls.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for primary page actions that belong in PageHeader actions.
components.accessibilityNotes: Toolbar controls must keep accessible names and visible labels where practical.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use PageToolbar for page controls; do not add grid-specific toolbar behavior here.

components.name: SideNav
components.purpose: Sidebar navigation for admin and customer portals with active, disabled, badge, icon, collapsed, header/footer slots, internal list scrolling, and one-level nested items.
components.useWhen: Use for app-level sidebar navigation without coupling to a router.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for complex tree navigation or data-grid column menus.
components.accessibilityNotes: Navigation should use nav landmark and current-page state.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep route state in the app and pass activeId/onSelect; do not add router dependencies. Use inside AppShell for persistent sidebars; SideNav keeps header/footer visible while the item list scrolls inside dv-side-nav__scroll.

components.name: TopNav
components.purpose: Compact top navigation/header bar with brand, navigation, actions, and user area slots.
components.useWhen: Use as the header region for enterprise app shells.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid when the application needs a fully custom marketing or public-site header.
components.accessibilityNotes: Navigation items need clear labels.
components.aiUsageNotes: TopNav does not own auth or user state; pass user UI through userArea.

components.name: Breadcrumbs
components.purpose: Hierarchical location trail with current page marking and optional link/button items.
components.useWhen: Use in nested admin or customer portal pages to show location.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for linear step progress or unrelated tabs.
components.basicUsageExample: <Breadcrumbs items={[{ label: 'Home', href: '/' }, { label: 'Orders', current: true }]} />
components.accessibilityNotes: Breadcrumb nav should use aria-label.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep routing in the app; pass href/onClick through items.

components.name: Tabs
components.purpose: Controlled or uncontrolled tab navigation with line, contained, and pills variants.
components.useWhen: Use for dense workflow sections with related tab panels.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for simple view modes; use SegmentedControl instead.
components.accessibilityNotes: Tabs need keyboard and aria-selected behavior.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use controlled value/onValueChange when tab state belongs to the app.

components.name: Radio
components.purpose: Native radio input with optional label, description, invalid, disabled, controlled, and uncontrolled states.
components.useWhen: Use for single-choice options, usually inside RadioGroup.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for binary settings; use Checkbox or Switch.
components.accessibilityNotes: Provide label or aria-label; group related radios with RadioGroup where practical.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use native Radio for simple choices and keep app state controlled when needed.

components.name: RadioGroup
components.purpose: Fieldset-based radio group with label, description, error, orientation, disabled, required, controlled, and uncontrolled state.
components.useWhen: Use for mutually exclusive choice sets in forms and settings.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for long option lists; use Select instead.
components.accessibilityNotes: Uses fieldset/legend and native radio keyboard behavior.
components.aiUsageNotes: Prefer RadioGroup over hand-built radio collections.

components.name: Switch
components.purpose: Native checkbox-backed switch for immediate on/off settings.
components.useWhen: Use for settings that take effect as enabled/disabled toggles.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for multi-step confirmation or non-immediate choices.
components.accessibilityNotes: Uses role='switch' and aria-checked for controlled checked state.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use Switch for settings; use Checkbox for acknowledgements and forms requiring checkbox semantics.

components.name: NumberInput
components.purpose: Native input type='number' control aligned with Dravyn input styling, with integer and decimal typing modes.
components.useWhen: Use for numeric settings, quantities, limits, and scores.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for formatted currency or masked values.
components.accessibilityNotes: Numeric constraints need clear labels and validation.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use mode='integer' for whole numbers and mode='decimal' with step for decimal values; do not build custom spinner UI.

components.name: DateInput
components.purpose: Native input type='date' control aligned with Dravyn input styling.
components.useWhen: Use for simple date values where the browser native picker is acceptable.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid when complex calendar range picking is required.
components.accessibilityNotes: Date formats need clear guidance.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not add a date picker or date library for basic date input.

components.name: DateTimeInput
components.purpose: Native input type='datetime-local' control aligned with Dravyn input styling.
components.useWhen: Use for simple local date/time scheduling values.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for timezone-heavy scheduling workflows.
components.accessibilityNotes: Label the control and explain expected timezone context where needed.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use native datetime-local behavior; do not add date libraries.

components.name: MultiSelect
components.purpose: Simple multi-value selection control with chips, optional search, clear action, and native checkbox options.
components.useWhen: Use for small multi-value option sets in forms and settings.
components.avoidWhen: Avoid for async, virtualized, creatable, or very large option sets.
components.accessibilityNotes: Multi-select needs clear keyboard and announcement behavior.
components.aiUsageNotes: Keep S3 MultiSelect simple; do not add async loading, creatable options, or virtualization.

components.name: Toast
components.useWhen: Use later for non-blocking action feedback.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Toast announcements should be polite unless urgent.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use InlineMessage/Alert until Toast exists.

components.name: Progress
components.useWhen: Use later for determinate or indeterminate progress.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Progress needs accessible value text where determinate.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use LoadingState until Progress exists.

components.name: DescriptionList
components.useWhen: Use later for resource details.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use semantic description list markup.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use native dl markup until implemented.

components.name: KeyValueList
components.useWhen: Use later for dense metadata.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Labels and values should remain clear at compact density.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use simple semantic markup until implemented.

components.name: PropertyTable
components.useWhen: Use later for comparable resource properties.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Use table semantics only for tabular data.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not use UniversalDataGrid for simple property display.

components.name: ResourceList
components.useWhen: Use later for non-tabular resource lists.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: List items need clear headings/actions.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use list markup or Card items until implemented.

components.name: Timeline
components.useWhen: Use later for audit/activity history.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Event order and timestamps should be clear.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use semantic lists until implemented.

components.name: ActivityLog
components.useWhen: Use later for recent changes and user activity.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Activity entries need clear actor/action/time text.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use plain list composition until implemented.

components.name: AdvancedFilterDrawer
components.useWhen: Use later for complex filter criteria.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Filter controls need labels and clear apply/reset behavior.
components.aiUsageNotes: Use existing filter state/contracts until implemented.

components.name: SavedViewSelector
components.purpose: Saved grid view selector and manager entry point.
components.useWhen: Use later for user preference presets.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Saved view actions need clear names and confirmation for delete.
components.aiUsageNotes: Do not build saved views before adapter contracts are stable.

components.name: ExportPreviewPanel
components.purpose: Export request preview and confirmation shell.
components.useWhen: Use later for export workflows.
components.avoidWhen: Do not import until implemented.
components.accessibilityNotes: Export scope and format must be explicit.
components.aiUsageNotes: Grid emits export requests; it does not generate files by default.
